title: Has anyone/know anyone who has tried the Blackstrap molasses and baking soda protocol?
body:
http://phkillscancer.com/

Heard about this today and I am having my mom try it for the next couple weeks before she begins her chemo. She is at stage 2 and we really believe there is other cures out there other than trying to kill the cancer cells before all the other good cells. My dad's friend also tried this 6 months ago (colon cancer) and he is now cancer free. Do you know anyone who has gone through this procedure and how it worked out?
